context: Tests whether the agent builds the Stripe and PayPal ingesters correctly, using the right Stripe API (balance transactions), filtering PayPal to settled-only, implementing idempotent upserts, mapping transaction types correctly, ingesting T-1 data, and running ingesters in parallel.

checklist.name: Stripe balance transactions API
checklist.description: The Stripe ingester calls stripe.balanceTransactions.list() (or equivalent balance transactions endpoint), NOT stripe.charges.list(), stripe.paymentIntents.list(), or other endpoints

checklist.name: PayPal settled-only filter
checklist.description: The PayPal ingester filters to only settled transactions (e.g. transaction_status: 'S' or equivalent settled status parameter), not all transaction statuses

checklist.name: Upsert on composite key
checklist.description: Both ingesters use an upsert/insert-or-update operation (not a plain insert) keyed on (source, source_transaction_id) to prevent duplicates on re-runs

checklist.name: T-1 date selection
checklist.description: The orchestration job targets yesterday's date (T-1), not today's date, as the ingestion window for both processors

checklist.name: Parallel ingestion
checklist.description: The orchestration script runs Stripe and PayPal ingestion concurrently (e.g. Promise.all or equivalent), not sequentially

checklist.name: Stripe transaction type mapping
checklist.description: The Stripe ingester maps Stripe-specific types (e.g. 'dispute' → 'chargeback', 'reserve_transaction' → 'reserve_release', 'stripe_fee' → 'fee') to normalized internal types

checklist.name: PayPal transaction type mapping
checklist.description: The PayPal ingester maps PayPal event codes to normalized types (e.g. T00x → 'charge', T11x → 'refund', T12x → 'chargeback', T20x → 'payout')

checklist.name: Gross/fee/net amounts stored
checklist.description: Both ingesters store gross_amount, fee_amount, and net_amount separately (not just a single amount field)

checklist.name: Implementation notes explains Stripe choice
checklist.description: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md explicitly states WHY balance transactions were chosen over charges/payment intents (e.g. mentions fees, refunds, payouts in same feed, or authoritative record)

checklist.name: No currency conversion
checklist.description: Neither ingester performs currency conversion — amounts are stored in the transaction's original currency
